tasks.title: Day 7 KPI checkpoint
tasks.description: Collect GitHub stars, LinkedIn impressions (C-02, C-04), X reach (C-03). Compare against targets. Document in kpi_report.md.

tasks.title: Day 14 KPI checkpoint + MENA assessment
tasks.description: Full metrics collection including Dev.to reads and Arabic piece reach (C-07, C-08). Decide: scale MENA content or maintain plan.

tasks.title: Day 30 final KPI checkpoint + content audit refresh
tasks.description: Full 30-day audit of all 12 pieces. SEO rank delta, engagement rates, conversion rates. Update publish_log.md with final metrics.

tasks.title: Retrospective — 4-question structured retro
tasks.description: Run 4-question retro after Day 30 checkpoint. What worked, what didn't, persona accuracy, Phase 06 changes.

tasks.title: Mirror sync + handoff to factory/library/
tasks.description: Run planning_mirror_sync.py --type content. Verify all 12 final pieces + gate reports synced. Update _manifest.yaml content plan status to completed.

tasks.title: Phase 06 content plan seed — input from retro
tasks.description: Create .ai/plan/content/phase-01-discovery/ for the next content cycle using retro.md findings as input. Pillar adjustments informed by KPI data.
